member.name: T:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.Language
member.summary: Languages supported by the VSA data models.

member.name: T:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.ModelVersion
member.summary: VSA-DSS Mini data-model versions supported by the pipeline.

member.name: T:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess
member.summary: Routes input files by semantic role, extracts metadata from the GEP transfer file, and enriches the pipeline with application resources and VSA repository data.

remarks.para: The VSA Matcher receives the original user upload (GEP transfer file and optional organisation table) together with the unzipped GEP checker output. It identifies each file by INTERLIS model name or filename pattern, extracts the data-model version (2020 / 2020.1) from the GEP header, selects version-matching application resources (GeoPackage template, error matrix, QGIS project), and fetches the standard organisation table from the public VSA repository.

ILI model filters use exact name matching (case-insensitive). A file matches when its declared models overlap with at least one entry in the corresponding filter set. Checker CSV identification uses regex patterns matched against the filename without extension.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Geopilot.Api.Pipeline.IPipelineFileManager,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Logger instance injected by the pipeline framework.
File manager for creating pipeline output files.
Path to the GeoPackage template for model version 2020.
Path to the GeoPackage template for model version 2020.1.
Path to the error matrix XLSX.
URL of the standard organisation table (2020) on the VSA repository.
URL of the standard organisation table (2020.1) on the VSA repository.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.RunAsync(Geopilot.PipelineCore.Pipeline.IPipelineFileList,Geopilot.PipelineCore.Pipeline.IPipelineFile[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs the VSA matcher: identifies input files, extracts metadata, loads resources, and provides named output channels for downstream processors.
member.param: The originally uploaded files (GEP transfer file, optional org table, ZIP).
Files extracted from the GEP checker ZIP by a preceding unzip step.
member.returns: A dictionary of named outputs for downstream pipeline steps.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.FindGepFiles(Geopilot.PipelineCore.Pipeline.IPipelineFileList)
member.summary: Finds all GEP transfer files among the uploaded XTF files. Each match carries its own model version and language. Checks version 2020.1 first (more specific) before 2020.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.FindOrgTables(Geopilot.PipelineCore.Pipeline.IPipelineFileList)
member.summary: Finds all user-provided organisation tables among the uploaded XTF files.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.FindCheckerCsvs(Geopilot.PipelineCore.Pipeline.IPipelineFile[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Finds all checker CSV files from the unzipped files. Files must reside in the and match the given filename regex pattern.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.ExtractIliModels(Geopilot.PipelineCore.Pipeline.IPipelineFile)
member.summary: Reads the INTERLIS model names declared in the XTF header of the given file. Supports INTERLIS 2.4 (namespace-qualified elements) and INTERLIS 2.3 (default-namespace uppercase elements with NAME attribute). Returns an empty set if the file cannot be parsed or matches neither format.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.CopyResourceToPipelineFileAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Copies a local application resource file into a pipeline-managed file.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.FetchToPipelineFileAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads a file from the given URL and stores it as a pipeline-managed file.

member.name: T:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.GepMatch
member.summary: A GEP file match with its associated model version and language.

member.name: M:VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.VsaMatcherProcess.GepMatch.#ctor(Geopilot.PipelineCore.Pipeline.IPipelineFile,VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.ModelVersion,VsaCheckerAnalytics.Process.Matcher.VsaMatcher.Language)
member.summary: A GEP file match with its associated model version and language.
